channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLscienceAndDiscovery, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Tea choice affects kombucha flavor and chemistry
item.description: Research shows kombucha's taste, chemistry, and antioxidants vary significantly based on the tea used.

item.title: Interstellar object prompts SETI search for alien signals
item.description: SETI scientists scanned 3I/ATLAS for alien technology but detected no artificial radio signals.

item.title: Four-winged dinosaur may have preyed on Earth's earliest birds
item.description: A newly discovered feathered dinosaur, Jianchangmaensis, could be the missing predator behind piles of crushed prehistoric bird remains.

item.title: DNA analysis reveals hidden bird species in Japan
item.description: A bird long considered a single rare species in Japan is actually two. Scientists found the elusive Ijima's Leaf Warbler and a new species are distinct.
